name: One-Bowl Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave the chocolate and butter in a large microwaveable bowl at HIGH for 2 minutes, or until the butter is melted. Stir until the chocolate is completely melted.
2. Stir in the sugar into the melted chocolate until well blended.
3. Stir in the eggs and vanilla until completely mixed.
4. Mix in the flour until well combined.
5. Stir in the nuts (if using).
6. Spread the mixture in a greased 13x9 inch pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out almost clean. Do not overbake.
8. Cool in the pan; cut into squares. Makes 24 brownies.
